Visual Hard Evidence: Original App vs Repo

This page is generated from saved artifacts. Reference panes render saved original-app HTML fragments with captured original CSS. Hidden/modal markup is forced visible only for inspection and is labeled as such. Repo panes use existing screenshot artifacts; fresh local screenshots require the local web/API servers to be running.

51saved .html reference files
4reference capture JSON files
56distinct Angular app-* selectors
23modal/overlay selectors

Reference Admin Capture Geometry

Drawn from docs/reference/captures/proroom-ultra-admin-room.json. Colored boxes show captured topnav/sidebar/presentation/webcam shell rects; red boxes show labeled controls visible in the capture.
